name: Tempur-Pedic TEMPUR-ProAdapt Medium
introText: The Tempur-Pedic TEMPUR-ProAdapt Medium is the original premium memory foam mattress — 30 years of engineering in a 30cm profile that provides unmatched pressure relief for side sleepers and pain sufferers.
whatWorks: TEMPUR material provides the best pressure relief available in any mattress — NASA-derived visco-elastic foam distributes weight unlike any other material, making it the top recommendation for chronic pain sufferers.
Motion isolation is absolute — partners don't feel each other move at all on Tempur-Pedic. The wine glass test (wine glass on the mattress while partner moves) is a Tempur-Pedic trademark.
worthKnowing: Very expensive at $3,499 CAD — almost double the Saatva Classic for a shorter trial period. Only justified for sleepers who've tried everything else and need maximum pressure relief.
Sleeps warm — TEMPUR material is denser than standard foam and retains more body heat. Hot sleepers should look at the Breeze version or the Purple Rejuvenate Plus instead.

commonComplaints.title: Sleeps warm
commonComplaints.body: The dense TEMPUR material retains body heat more than hybrid or grid mattresses. Hot sleepers consistently report this issue.

commonComplaints.title: Very expensive for 90-night trial
commonComplaints.body: At $3,499, a 90-night trial is shorter than competitors — the Saatva Classic offers a 365-night trial at roughly half the price.

commonComplaints.title: Heavy and hard to move
commonComplaints.body: TEMPUR foam is dense and the mattress is very heavy — rotating or moving requires professional assistance.

verdict: The Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt Medium is the best mattress money can buy for pressure relief and motion isolation — but only if you sleep cool and have the budget. For most people, the Saatva Classic or Endy Hybrid delivers 85% of the comfort at 40–50% of the price.

realBuyers.quote: Chronic hip pain for 10 years. Slept on the Tempur-Pedic for a month. Pain is 80% better. Worth every dollar.
Partner gets up 5 times a night. I feel nothing. The motion isolation is miraculous.
The most comfortable mattress I've ever slept on. Should have bought one 20 years ago.

metaDescription: Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt Medium review Canada: TEMPUR foam, medium, 90-night trial. $3,499 CAD (Queen). Best memory foam mattress for pressure relief in Canada.
